summary:
In Le Fort osteotomy, anchorage is derived solely through dental apparatuses attached externally to teeth rather than direct bony fixation. Intramaxillary anchorage—a form of internal skeletal stabilization—is therefore not used and represents an unapplied technique based on available descriptions.

The summary above contains more information than required by your instruction; please revise it so only two concise sentences remain focused exclusively on core clinical facts related to the query.
